# Resource: proxmox_notifications_matcher

Manages a notification matcher.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The unique name of the matcher.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Comment.
- `disable` (Boolean) Disable this matcher. Defaults to `false`.
- `invert_match` (Boolean) Invert the match of the whole matcher.
- `match_calendar` (List of String) Match notification timestamps using systemd calendar event notation.
- `match_field` (Attributes List) Match notification metadata fields. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--match_field))
- `match_severity` (List of String) Match notification severities.
- `mode` (String) How to combine multiple match conditions. One of `all`, `any`. Defaults to `all`.
- `target` (List of String) List of notification target names to route matched notifications to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--match_field"></a>
### Nested Schema for `match_field`

Required:

- `field` (String) Metadata field name to match.
- `type` (String) Match type. One of `regex`, `exact`.
- `value` (String) Value to match against.
